title: pteridium lineare
intro: Pteridium lineare, also known as bracken fern, is a type of flowering plant in the fern family (Dryopteridaceae) and is a member of the genus Pteridium. The medicinal properties of Pteridium lineare include its potential to inhibit cancer cell growth and its anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of bracken fern include its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as its potential to reduce the risk of certain cancers and improve immune function. Bracken fern can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
